Container.Name: sharetab
Container.Overview:
ShareTab is an open-source, self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI-powered receipt scanning.
All-in-one container: PostgreSQL is bundled inside — no external database required.
Features: - Group expense tracking with multiple split modes - AI receipt scanning: photograph a receipt, extract items, assign to friends - Pluggable AI providers: OpenAI, Claude, Claude SDK, or local Ollama - Cross-group dashboard with debt simplification - PWA installable on mobile - Magic link email authentication (optional)
Container.Description: Self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI receipt scanning. All-in-one container with bundled PostgreSQL — no external database needed. Split expenses with friends using multiple modes (equal, percentage, shares, exact, item-level from receipts). Supports OpenAI, Claude, and local Ollama for receipt extraction.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port to expose ShareTab on

Config.Name: Database Data
Config.Description: Path to store PostgreSQL data (persists across restarts)

Config.Name: Receipt Uploads
Config.Description: Path to store uploaded receipt images

Config.Name: NextAuth URL
Config.Description: The URL where ShareTab is accessible (e.g., http://your-server-ip:3000)

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: NextAuth Secret
Config.Description: Same value as Auth Secret (required by NextAuth)

Config.Name: Auth Trust Host
Config.Description: Set to true when running on a local network or behind a reverse proxy

Config.Name: DB Password
Config.Description: Password for the bundled PostgreSQL user

Config.Name: DB User
Config.Description: Username for the bundled PostgreSQL database

Config.Name: DB Name
Config.Description: Name of the bundled PostgreSQL database

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: AI provider for receipt scanning: openai | claude | claude-sdk | ollama

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (required if AI_PROVIDER=openai)

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Claude (required if AI_PROVIDER=claude)

Config.Name: Anthropic Auth Token
Config.Description: Claude OAuth token for claude-sdk provider (uses Claude Max/Pro subscription). Expires every ~8h.

Config.Name: Ollama URL
Config.Description: Ollama server URL (required if AI_PROVIDER=ollama)

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: Ollama vision model for receipt scanning

Config.Name: Email SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server for magic link auth emails. Leave blank to disable magic link sign-in.

Config.Name: Email SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port (465 for implicit TLS, 587 for STARTTLS)

Config.Name: Email SMTP User
Config.Description: SMTP username / email address

Config.Name: Email SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password or app password

Config.Name: Email From
Config.Description: From address for sent emails

Config.Name: Google OAuth Client ID
Config.Description: Google OAuth client ID (optional — enables Google sign-in)

Config.Name: Google OAuth Client Secret
Config.Description: Google OAuth client secret

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum receipt image upload size in megabytes
